title: Maintain integrated plant and animal systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain integrated plant and animal systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan maintenance of integrated plant and animal systems

pcs.text: Read and interpret design specifications for permaculture property
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read and interpret design specifications for permaculture property?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read and interpret design specifications for permaculture property.

pcs.text: Identify and assess maintenance requirements for integrated plant and animal system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess maintenance requirements for integrated plant and animal system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess maintenance requirements for integrated plant and animal system.

pcs.text: Consult stakeholders for input on maintenance activities according to permaculture property requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult stakeholders for input on maintenance activities according to permaculture property requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and prepare tools, equipment, machinery and materials for maintenance activities.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Arrange maintenance activities and movement through production areas to minimise disturbance and degradation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange maintenance activities and movement through production areas to minimise disturbance and degradation.
